changelog: 1.0.0 — Lesson 004: 808 - Gucci archetype based on operator ear-pass (no lows finding)
style: 808 Top Layer / Transient-focused knock with no sub-fundamental

mappings.designIntent: Focus on the 'knock' and transient definition of an 808 without providing the sub-bass weight; intended for layering or as a specialized percussive element.
mappings.character: No lows — thin, mid-range 'knock' with no sub fundamental; sounds like a transient-only top layer or a 'click' focused 808 variant.
mappings.causalReasoning: A strong high-pass filter or extremely short decay removes the perceived sub body. What remains is the transient click and upper harmonics, giving a mid-range knock without sustained low-frequency energy.
mappings.filterAndSpectral: High-pass filtering (typically >150Hz) or steep low-shelf reduction that isolates the harmonic residue above the fundamental.
mappings.envelopeAndTiming: Often characterized by short decay on the fundamental or a very fast pitch envelope that establishes the 'knock' before the sub is removed spectraly.
mappings.mixRole: Layering component; provides the 'point' and 'snap' to a separate sub-bass source, or acts as a mid-focused melodic bass in sparse arrangements.

character: No lows — thin, mid-range 'knock' with no sub fundamental; sounds like a transient-only top layer.
causalReasoning: A strong high-pass filter or extremely short decay removes the perceived sub body. What remains is the transient click and upper harmonics, giving a mid-range knock without sustained low-frequency energy.
coreRules: Absence of sub fundamental + mid-range articulation -> defines the 'top layer' 808 archetype.
High-pass filter or ultra-short decay -> creates a percussive knock without fundamental weight.

contrastWith.difference: 004 is a 'no-lows' transient variant focused on mid-range knock, whereas Lesson 1 (Role Model) is a full-frequency 808 focused on weight and sub-bass authority. Using 004 logic for a main bass line will result in a weak, 'broken' sounding low-end.
